name: Tru Home Loans, LLC
description_short: Phoenix-based wholesale mortgage broker offering home purchase, refinance, and specialized loan programs including FHA, VA, conventional, and jumbo loans.
description_long:
Tru Home Loans, LLC is a mortgage brokerage firm headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, founded to serve homebuyers and homeowners seeking competitive mortgage financing. The company operates as a wholesale mortgage broker, positioning itself as an intermediary connecting borrowers with multiple loan options rather than originating loans directly.

The firm offers a comprehensive suite of mortgage products including FHA loans, VA loans, conventional mortgages, home refinance loans, jumbo home loans, and home purchase loans. Customers can access rate quotes, qualification estimates, and loan program information through their website. The company provides services for both home purchases and refinancing scenarios, including rate-and-term refinances and cash-out refinancing options. They also operate a real estate resource section featuring property listings, home value tools, and realtor connections.

Tru Home Loans distinguishes itself through personalized service and team-based support. The website prominently features Ron Kelleher as the primary contact (602-723-8940) with team members including Kris and Jacquie mentioned in customer testimonials. Customer reviews consistently highlight the team's responsiveness, detailed explanations of loan processes, and proactive communication throughout the mortgage lifecycle. The company emphasizes education through loan program descriptions, calculators, and a professional success center.

The company demonstrates solid customer satisfaction based on recent testimonials, though information about licensing, regulatory certifications, and specific loan terms is not detailed on the public-facing website. As a wholesale broker model, borrowers should understand they are not borrowing directly from Tru Home Loans but rather through partnered lenders. No specific information about APR ranges, loan limits, credit requirements, or processing timelines is publicly available.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Personalized service with named loan officers (Ron Kelleher, Kris, Jacquie) available for direct client relationships
Multiple loan program types including FHA, VA, conventional, and jumbo options accessible through single broker
Responsive communication and proactive follow-up throughout the loan process per customer testimonials
Educational resources including loan calculators, program comparisons, and professional success center
Integrated real estate services with home search tools, valuations, and realtor referrals
Strong recent customer reviews (May 2025, April 2025) emphasizing thoroughness and attention to detail
Direct contact information provided with local Phoenix phone number for accessibility
cons: Website lacks specific information about interest rates, APR ranges, or loan term details
No published information about minimum credit scores, loan limits, or eligibility requirements
Limited transparency about timeline estimates for loan approval and closing processes
As a wholesale broker model, borrowers do not originate loans directly with this company, adding a middleman step
No information about fees, closing costs, or compensation structure disclosed on website
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking guidance through the purchase process with educational support
Existing homeowners exploring refinance options to lower rates or access home equity
Military service members and veterans interested in VA loan programs
Borrowers seeking personalized service and direct relationships with named loan officers
diagnosis: Tru Home Loans is best suited for borrowers in the Phoenix area seeking a personal relationship-based mortgage broker experience with emphasis on education and communication. Primary caveat: as a wholesale broker, the company connects borrowers to third-party lenders rather than originating loans directly, and the website provides minimal transparency about specific loan terms, rates, fees, or underwriting requirements.
services: Real estate listing search and home valuation tools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
